title: Apply knowledge of ADAS technology in vehicle pre-repair scans
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply knowledge of ADAS technology in vehicle pre-repair scans demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify ADAS components used in vehicle pre-repair scan

pcs.text: Identify and clarify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify information, tools and equipment required for diagnosis activity1.3 Apply workplace procedures to locate ADAS technology and identify its components according to manufacturer specifications1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and clarify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify information, tools and equipment required for diagnosis activity1.3 Apply workplace procedures to locate ADAS technology and identify its components according to manufacturer specifications1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and clarify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify information, tools and equipment required for diagnosis activity1.3 Apply workplace procedures to locate ADAS technology and identify its components according to manufacturer specifications1.4 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify ADAS components used in vehicle pre-repair scan

elements.title: Identify damage to ADAS components

pcs.text: Identify information required to identify ADAS faults, including any limitations to workplace procedures for diagnosis and repair activity2.2 Carry out diagnostic scan of ADAS according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Carry out visual inspection of components to identify any damage 2.4 Identify and document diagnostic scan and visual inspections findings with reference to workplace procedures2.5 Confirm and report diagnosis findings according to workplace procedures, recording any limitations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify information required to identify ADAS faults, including any limitations to workplace procedures for diagnosis and repair activity2.2 Carry out diagnostic scan of ADAS according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Carry out visual inspection of components to identify any damage 2.4 Identify and document diagnostic scan and visual inspections findings with reference to workplace procedures2.5 Confirm and report diagnosis findings according to workplace procedures, recording any limitations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify information required to identify ADAS faults, including any limitations to workplace procedures for diagnosis and repair activity2.2 Carry out diagnostic scan of ADAS according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Carry out visual inspection of components to identify any damage 2.4 Identify and document diagnostic scan and visual inspections findings with reference to workplace procedures2.5 Confirm and report diagnosis findings according to workplace procedures, recording any limitations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify damage to ADAS components

elements.title: Evaluate knowledge of ADAS

pcs.text: Check knowledge regularly with colleagues and supervisor to ensure currency and accuracy 3.2 Identify any authorised external repairers for escalation of further diagnosis and repair3.3 Refer diagnostic findings to required workplace personnel3.4 Complete pre-repair scan documentation according to workplace procedures
